name: Change Return Address Details on Shipping Consignment Labels
body: [{"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To change the return address details printed on your shipping labels from your Neto by Maropost control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on "}, {"text": "Carriers & Labels", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the carrier you wish to edit the return address for."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Under "}, {"text": "Carrier and Account Details", "bold": true}, {"text": ", scroll down to "}, {"text": "Return Address Shown on Labels", "bold": true}, {"text": " and make the necessary changes and press "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}]
